name: Wahington School Bus Lines
notes: No SAFER record for 'Wahington School Bus Lines' or 'Washington School Bus Lines' (variants tried: WAHINGTON, WASHINGTON SCHOOL BUS, WASHINGTON BUS — all no records). Source name appears to be a directory artifact/typo. The address 5610 Middlebrook Pike, Knoxville, TN 37921 is currently associated with JLL Transport LLC (USDOT 2563033) — intrastate carrier, school bus service per Yellow Pages — but JLL's SAFER physical address is 9925 Hall Dr, Knoxville. No matching active TN registry filing for 'Wahington/Washington School Bus Lines' found. Likely defunct/intrastate-only small operator; no USDOT (likely intrastate). Name match not confirmed.

name: Schooltrans
notes: No SAFER record for SCHOOLTRANS or SCHOOL TRANS in Tennessee. Confirmed as active TN bus provider via CMS NPI Registry (NPI 1962617555, enumerated May 2007), taxonomy 347B00000X (Bus). Operator: Michael A Jones, President. Phone (901) 433-1600. Two addresses on record: 1725 E Holmes Rd, Memphis TN 38116 (primary/NPI) and 3949 Whitebrook Plaza, Memphis TN 38118 (Yelp/source). No USDOT (likely intrastate-only school/non-emergency bus transport in Memphis area). TN SOS entity filing not directly retrieved (search portal blocked WebFetch).
